description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, and slightly weathered vertical shaft with a classic ornamental base, set on a square section of stone pavement. The post is topped with a multi-branched lamp head, each branch supporting a globe-shaped light fixture, reminiscent of traditional European street lighting. The base is robust and flared, with decorative moldings and a slightly raised plinth, suggesting cast iron construction. The shaft displays subtle textural variations and patina, indicating exposure to the elements over time. The lamp head is ornate, with multiple arms radiating outward and upward, each ending in a rounded globe, providing both functional illumination and visual elegance. No signage or additional attachments are visible, and the lamppost is firmly anchored to the ground.
description: A tall, classic-style lamppost with a decorative base and a multi-globe lamp head, set on a stone pavement section. The post is weathered and ornate, evoking traditional European street lighting.
description_view_0: The lamppost is seen from a slight angle, highlighting the ornate base and the multi-globe lamp head, with the pavement extending to the left.
description_view_1: This view shows the lamppost from the opposite side, revealing more of the stone pavement and the curvature of the base.
description_view_2: A direct side view, emphasizing the slender shaft and the symmetrical arrangement of the lamp head, with the pavement squarely beneath.
description_view_3: The lamppost is viewed from another angle, showing the decorative base and the multi-globe lamp head, with a missing section of pavement visible.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Ornate multi-arm design with spherical globe fixtures in a classic European style
